headline: Is UnitedHealth Group (UNH) Pricing Reflect Sector Pressures After A 39% Share Price Decline
summary: If you are wondering whether UnitedHealth Group's current share price reflects its true value, you are not alone. This article will walk through the key numbers that matter. The stock last closed at US$285.25, with returns of a 2.3% decline over 7 days, 3.5% over 30 days, a 15.2% decline year to date, and a 39.0% decline over the past year. This raises questions about how the market is currently pricing the company. Recent headlines around UnitedHealth Group have focused on wider sector...

headline: Trump Ally, New DHS Leader Nominee Markwayne Mullin Makes New Stock Trades: Here's What He Bought And Sold
summary: Sen. Markwayne Mullin (R-Okla.) could become the next leader of the Department of Homeland Security, as he was named recently the nominee to replace Kristi Noem by President Donald Trump. A current member of the Senate, Mullin has been an active stock trader in recent years.
